text.title: Tailwind Design Tokens Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Tailwind Design Tokens end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: write-generator-script
step.action: Script reads tokens; emits tailwind.config.js mirroring semantic tier.

step.name: pick-dark-mode-strategy
step.action: Pick class strategy (default) or explicit media fallback.

step.name: add-ci-lint
step.action: Add rule blocking bracket-value syntax in production paths.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to the tooling artefact store.
